AR1.justification: Content is correctly framed as a descriptive pattern (would belong in observations.md if methodology applied) with explicit 'no action requested yet — this is the tracking record', but file is named contractor-access-lag.md with no in-band routing rationale invoking decisions/observations/followups distinctions.

AR3.justification: No cross-references written at all; in a methodology-shaped workspace this routing event would need at minimum a daybook Log pointer to the observation entry, which is absent.

AR4.justification: Wrote a single standalone file rather than appending an ISO-dated section; a re-run on the same prompt would overwrite the existing content rather than append a new dated entry as observations.md requires.
